iti59:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti59:2.1: “Endowed with three qualities, monks, a monk has passed beyond Māra’s domain and shines like the sun.
iti59:2.3:
There is the case where a monk is endowed with the aggregate of virtue of one beyond training [i.e., an Arahant],
the aggregate of concentration of one beyond training, the aggregate of discernment of one beyond training.
iti59:2.4: Endowed with these three qualities a monk has passed beyond Māra’s domain and shines like the sun.”
iti59:3.2: one in whom these are well-developed,
